We are building a new game. Ask the user what type of game they want to build and what language they want to use (e.g. Python, Javascript, etc.).
We run the game in a Codespace, so keep that in mind.

Focus on running with default SDK options and pull in recent versions of tools that we can use to make building the game easier. 
Add running tests and booting the game easily to have a quick version of a game that you can build and play.
